use std::error::Error;

// BAD: public API exposing Box<dyn Error>
pub fn parse_input(input: &str) -> Result<ParsedData, Box<dyn Error>> {
    let data = serde_json::from_str(input)?;
    validate_data(&data)?;
    Ok(data)
}

pub fn load_plugin(path: &str) -> Result<Plugin, Box<dyn Error + Send + Sync>> {
    let lib = unsafe { libloading::Library::new(path)? };
    let entry: libloading::Symbol<fn() -> Plugin> = unsafe { lib.get(b"create")? };
    Ok(entry())
}

pub fn fetch_url(url: &str) -> Result<Vec<u8>, Box<dyn Error>> {
    let response = reqwest::blocking::get(url)?;
    let bytes = response.bytes()?;
    Ok(bytes.to_vec())
}
